title: Products
intro: Define your regular parts, labour and fixed-price services once. Typing the code on a job-card line pre-fills a simple item; fixed-price services are added on the card via a tier picker. All prices are ex VAT.
empty: No products yet. Add your first to speed up job-card entry.
name: Description
confirmDelete: Delete this product permanently? Historic job-card lines keep their values; only the link is cleared.
codeInUse: That code is already in use.
componentsHint: Cost + spec only. Descriptions concatenate into the invoice line; components never print as priced rows.

tierGrid.heading: Tier prices (ex VAT)
tierGrid.hint: Blank = inherit the base price. Enter a price to override, or tick “price on the day” to offer the tier with the price set per job.

tiers.heading: Service tiers
tiers.intro: Optional vehicle/price tiers for fixed-price services (e.g. Sub-2L, Performance, Electric). Leave empty for a single-price catalogue.
tiers.name: Tier name
tiers.empty: No tiers — fixed-price services use a single base price.
tiers.confirmDelete: Delete this tier? Its per-service prices are removed; services fall back to their base price.

labourHoursHint: The labour content of this fixed price (e.g. 7.5). Not the booking duration — this feeds the dashboard’s hours-charged figure.
